## What Exists Today

Describe the current behaviour or feature.

## What Should Be Improved

What's the desired change and why?

## Who Benefits

Which users does this help? All users, a specific addon's users, or a niche configuration?

## Additional Context

Any other context — screenshots, Help Scout conversations, WordPress.org support links, etc.
